# togetherai_beta_cluster_storage (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "togetherai_beta_cluster_storage" "example_beta_cluster_storage" {
  volume_id = "volume_id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `volume_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `size_tib` (Number)
- `status` (String) Available values: "available", "bound", "provisioning".
- `volume_name` (String)
